rulings.Case Title: CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS VS. SAEED KHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Courts Order Of September 3, 2019 Denying Injunctive Relief Pursuant To Ccp 1008
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 29, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Courts Order Of September 3, 2019 Denying Injunctive Relief Pursuant To Ccp 1008 is continued to December 20, 2019. By no later than October 31, 2019 Plaintiff to file a motion for leave to amend complaint to add allegations re: freezer and calendar the hearing for December 3, 2019. If motion for leave to amend is granted, amended complaint to be filed and served on December 3, 2019; Defendant to file supplemental opposition to this motion no later than December 10, 2019; Plaintiff to file supplemental reply no later than December 16, 2019. Supplemental briefs shall be limited to issue re: freezer. If Plaintiff chooses not to seek leave to amend, Plaintiff may appear ex-parte on any date after October 31, 2019 (except Tuesdays) to seek to advance the hearing on this motion. The Court is currently inclined to deny Preliminary Injunction based on Plaintiff's assertions that building's plumbing (under Defendant's floor and above Plaintiff's ceiling) must be repaired by the Defendants. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS VS. SAEED KHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting A Status Conference For The Purpose Of Appointing A Mediator
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 29, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT SAEED KHAN Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting A Status Conference For The Purpose Of Appointing A Mediator earing Required. By no later than October 29, 2019 each party to submit (1) two names of proposed mediators ready and willing to start mediation within 30 days; and (2) proposed timeline for completion of mediation. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 915 FRANKLIN STREET ASSOCIATES L.P. VS. SHIRLEY A. SADIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession; Memo Of P&A; Declarations In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 29, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY SANTIAGO Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Judgement is Vacated and the Writ is Recalled. The Court notes that there is a discrepancy between the caption and the body of the motion. However, since non-opposition is filed to the motion as captioned, the motion will not be taken off calendar. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID WONG VS. GUICHAM WU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 29, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT WEN YU, GUICHAN WU DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Landlords' declarations fail to comply with Regulation 12.14(b)(8), e.g. (i) the reason why the landlord is moving from his/her current residence to the unit for which possession is sought is not included in the declarations. =(501/CFH)
